items.body_preview:
Adds [X.orb](https://xorb.xyz) to the ecosystem under **Infrastructure & Tooling**.

## What is X.orb

X.orb orchestrates trust infrastructure for AI agents. One API call runs every agent action through an 8-gate security pipeline: identity (ERC-8004), permissions, rate limits, x402 micropayments (EIP-3009), audit logging, trust scoring (MoltGuard), execution, and escrow.

items.title: specs: add zk-relay scheme for privacy-preserving ZK payments
items.body_preview:
## Summary

This PR introduces the `zk-relay` scheme specification -- a new payment scheme for privacy-preserving asset transfers using zero-knowledge proofs. Unlike the `exact` scheme where transfers are visible on-chain, `zk-relay` breaks the link between depositor and withdrawer using shielded notes and ZK proofs.

### How it works

1. A client shields (deposits) ETH into a smart contract, receiving a private note
2. To withdraw, the client generates a ZK proof in the browser (Noir + UltraHon
